fields.description:
## Summary

With the ALLOW_MODEL_REQUESTS session-guard fix landed (Gerrit 442), the external
'external integration (live services)' job now runs its live tests (17 pass) instead of
failing every one at the model call. That unmasked 3 pre-existing failures — tests not
updated for src design changes landed after the suite last passed (2026-06-16):

1. **test_ref_lock_ac0_live.py** — `ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'rebar_reconciler'`
   at _ref_lock.py:249 (reconciler git-op refactor d9e0f0e7 added a deferred import; the
   file-path-loaded test never put src/rebar/_engine on sys.path).
2. **test_pydantic_text_mode** — `RuntimeError: agentic filesystem tools OUTSIDE the
   repo-snapshot gate` (config.py:228); the direct-runner RunRequest defaulted to
   execution_mode='agentic' (snapshot-gate epic b25fafcd1). A text reply needs no fs tools.
3. **test_pydantic_review_code** — `assert 'code-review-disabled' == 'pydantic_ai'`;
   review_code became an off-by-default four-pass gate (2d3e7611a). ENABLED, the gate runs
   via and reports the pydantic_ai runner (verified live) — so the fix is to enable the
   capability, and the test's original runner=='pydantic_ai' assertion holds.

All three are test-only fixes (no src defect).

## Reproduction Steps

1. Trigger the external-integration workflow (external job) on main.
2. Observe: 3 failed, 17 passed, 8 skipped — the 3 failures above.

Expected: the external job is green. Actual: 3 stale live tests fail.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] test_ref_lock_ac0_live puts src/rebar/_engine on sys.path so `from rebar_reconciler import ...` resolves (mirrors sibling external tests).
- [ ] test_pydantic_text_mode runs the text path without tripping the snapshot gate (execution_mode='single_turn' — text needs no fs tools).
- [ ] test_pydantic_review_code enables verify.enable_code_review and asserts the live gated path: runner == 'pydantic_ai' (the enabled four-pass gate runs via and reports the pydantic_ai runner — verified live) and findings is a list.
- [ ] Verified end-to-end: the external-integration GitHub Action's external job runs green.
